headline: Strategic opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and transition planning.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if disclosures lag.
Potential ESG score gap vs. peers as renewables are deprioritized; risk of index exclusion if fossil fuel exposure rises.
Potential negative sentiment among ESG-focused talent and consumers; community opposition risk.
